errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.body: Backyard hit an unexpected error. Restarting should fix it — nothing you were doing caused this.

profile.matureContentDesc: Allow graphic history, crime, and adult themes
profile.deleteAccountBody: This permanently deletes your account, tours, ratings, and comments. This can't be undone.
profile.deleteAccountBodyPremium: This permanently deletes your account, tours, ratings, and comments. This can't be undone. It does NOT cancel your Backyard Pro subscription — cancel it separately in your App Store or Play Store account settings, or you'll keep being charged.

safety.title: Before you walk
safety.subtitle: Backyard narrates the neighborhood — it doesn't guide you across the street. A few reminders while your first block loads:
safety.tip1: Cross only at marked crosswalks, and wait for the signal.
safety.tip2: Look both ways before stepping into any street — even one-ways.
safety.tip3: Keep one ear free or your volume low, so you can hear traffic and sirens.
safety.tip4: Stop walking before checking your screen or the map.
safety.tip5: Extra caution after dark or somewhere unfamiliar.

tourComplete.nameSubtitle: Give it a name before you move on
tourComplete.titlePlaceholder: e.g. Sunset stroll through Hayes Valley
tourComplete.shareToWalkToo: Share it so others can walk it too.

tourComplete.shareAsRouteDesc: Others can discover and walk it themselves
tourComplete.discardConfirmBody: This deletes it permanently — it won't be saved to your history or published.

card1.title: Welcome to Backyard
card1.body: Walk anywhere, and hear real stories about the streets, buildings, and history around you — narrated as you go.

card2.title: Pick a mood
card2.body: Time Machine, Hidden City, Dark Side, Behind the Scenes, Unfiltered — same streets, completely different stories each time.

card3.title: Discover routes from others
card3.body: Every walk can be published as a route for others to follow. Browse what's nearby, rated by the community.

card4.title: Ready to explore?
card4.body: Pick a mood and start walking — narration triggers automatically as you approach each new spot.
